\smallskip\noindent\textit{Scott booleans}\par\nobreak
\begin{dmath*}
\mathtt{true} = \lambda a.\,\allowbreak \lambda b.\,\allowbreak a
\end{dmath*}
\begin{dmath*}
\mathtt{false} = \lambda a.\,\allowbreak \lambda b.\,\allowbreak b

\end{dmath*}
\begin{dmath*}

\end{dmath*}

\begin{dmath*}
